title: 4 Real Estate Companies With Predictable Revenue Growth
text: In light of increasing home prices during November 2021, four real estate companies that have high profitability and are trading at fair GF Value as of January include American Tower Corp. ( AMT , Financial), Equinix Inc. ( EQIX , Financial), SBA Communications Corp. ( SBAC , Financial) and CoStar Group Inc. ( CSGP , Financial) according to the All-in-One Screener, a Premium feature of GuruFocus.
